has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:coneAngle</field><value name="VAL"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:particleCount</field><value name="VAL"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></block></value><next><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:coneLength</field><value name="VAL"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">Entity player = entity;&#10;Vec3 eyePos = player.getEyePosition();&#10;        Vec3 lookVec = player.getViewVector(1.0F);&#10;        &#10;        // Get player's yaw and pitch&#10;        float yaw = player.getYRot();&#10;        float pitch = player.getXRot();&#10;        &#10;        double maxSpreadRad = Math.toRadians(coneAngle);&#10;        &#10;        for (int i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {&#10;            // Random distance&#10;            double distance = 0.5 + Math.random() * (coneLength - 0.5);&#10;            &#10;            // Random spread within cone&#10;            double spreadYaw = (Math.random() - 0.5) * maxSpreadRad * 2;&#10;            double spreadPitch = (Math.random() - 0.5) * maxSpreadRad * 2;&#10;            &#10;            // Calculate direction with spread&#10;            float finalYaw = (float) Math.toRadians(yaw + Math.toDegrees(spreadYaw));&#10;            float finalPitch = (float) Math.toRadians(pitch + Math.toDegrees(spreadPitch));&#10;            &#10;            // Convert to direction vector&#10;            double horizontalDist = Math.cos(finalPitch);&#10;            double vx = -Math.sin(finalYaw) * horizontalDist;&#10;            double vy = -Math.sin(finalPitch);&#10;            double vz = Math.cos(finalYaw) * horizontalDist;&#10;            &#10;            Vec3 direction = new Vec3(vx, vy, vz).normalize();&#10;            &#10;            // Particle position&#10;            Vec3 particlePos = eyePos.add(direction.scale(distance));&#10;            &#10;            // Particle velocity (moves outward)&#10;            double velocityMult = 0.03;&#10;        &#10;sprayX = particlePos.x;&#10;sprayY = particlePos.y;&#10;sprayZ = particlePos.z;&#10;particleDX = direction.x * velocityMult;&#10;particleDY = direction.y * velocityMult;&#10;particleDZ = direction.z * velocityMult;&#10;            }</field><next><block type="spawn_particle_multi" inline="false"><field name="particle">WATER_SPLASH</field><value name="count"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></block></value><value name="x"><block name="VAR">local:sprayY</field></block></value><value name="z"><block type="variables_get_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:sprayZ</field></block></value><value name="dx"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.2</field></block></value><value name="dy"><block
